scripts.start: wrangler dev --ip 0.0.0.0 --port 4000 --local --config wrangler.toml --var PATHOFEXILE_CLIENT_ID:$PATHOFEXILE_CLIENT_ID --var PATHOFEXILE_CLIENT_SECRET:$PATHOFEXILE_CLIENT_SECRET --var PATHOFEXILE_REDIRECT_URL:$PATHOFEXILE_REDIRECT_URL --var FRONTEND_URL:$FRONTEND_URL --var CORS_ORIGIN:$FRONTEND_URL --var S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY:$S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY --var S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID:$S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID --var S3_BUCKET_NAME:$S3_BUCKET_NAME --var S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY:$S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY --var S3_ENDPOINT:$S3_ENDPOINT --var VALKEY_PROXY_URL:$VALKEY_PROXY_URL --var VALKEY_TOKEN:$VALKEY_TOKEN
